questions.question: In Vuex, what is the ONLY way to change state, and what constraint must they follow?
options: Getters: they derive new state synchronously
Dispatches: they can be async or sync

questions.question: What is the Vuex data flow order from a component interaction to state update?
What was the main reason Pinia was created to replace Vuex?
options: Vuex had performance issues with large state trees
Vuex could not be used with the Composition API
Vuex's string-based API had no TypeScript type safety
Vuex did not support SSR rendering
